passives.name: Flux
passives.effects: Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them refunds 15% {{as|(+ {{fd|0.15}}% per 1 Lethality)}} of your ultimate ability's '''total''' cooldown.

effects_structured.raw: Takedown within 3s of damaging refunds 15% + 0.15% per lethality of ultimate cooldown.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Flux triggers on champion takedown (kill or assist) if the user damaged that champion within the prior 3 seconds, then refunds a percentage of the ultimate's total cooldown.
Timing note: For ultimates whose cooldown starts after cast resolution, Flux refund is applied once that cooldown actually starts.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Axiom Arc)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of takedown trigger gating, 3-second damage window, and ultimate total-cooldown refund semantics
